feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP document for SAP ECC to S4HANA(TM, EWM) Integration document
entry.content:
We have SAP ECC as ERP & we are using both TM & EWM in S/4HANA & we are looking for Integration steps document to transfer the master data, transaction data & complete the process using the steps
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Duplicate spool is getting generated in MIGO for Mtyp 311.
entry.content:
Hello Friends

When i am trying to do transfer posting in MIGO, movement type 311 for custom Output , duplicate spools are getting generated which is causing paper wastage.

Replication steps.Step 1. Run the tcode MIGO
Step 2. Choose A08 Transfer posting, R10 Other
Step 3. Enter material <XXXXXXXXXX>, Plant XXXX, Issuing Storage location XXXX, Destination storage location XXXX and Quantity 1.
Step 4. Click on Post.

Did debugging there is no code to generate duplicate spools.

And even choosing Individual slip while posting.

 

Regards

Naeeum

entry.title: Full and partial pallet putaway storage type determination based on quantity classification
Outbound delivery from ERP is not replicating to EWM
entry.content:
I am receiving below error in SMQ2.

No item type determined for lower-level item (OUTB DLG).

I have prepared the delivery for kitting process and completed all config as well. Urgent help needed.

entry.title: Can not see storage location field while creation of Control cycle(LPK1)
entry.content:
Dear,

During creation of control cycle (LPK1), the fields for source information is not appearing in my system.

I want to input the storage location but that field is not visible.

Can someone please support.

Please find the screenshot in the attachment.

entry.title: Packing specifications SAP EWM
entry.content:
I have a requirement that packing required for a product1 that received from Vendor1 and no packing for the same product1 from different vendor2 before final putaway.

what settings that required to pack and no pack for the same product from two different vendors?

entry.title: /scwm/adgi - Posting Date in Inventory Management for Migration
entry.content:
Hello, 

What kind of customizing should be done in order to "unlock" the field Posting date in the TC /scwm/adgi

With the current settings this option is disabled. Please see attached image. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: EWM IOT5 in Embedded(1909)
entry.content:
• Dear Expert,

My requirement is to stop creating inspection lot for STO scenario at the receiving location and where as want to create internal movement using IOT5 for a particular warehouse in physical stock.

Hence please suggest me how to achieve both the scenarios as the inspection type #08 is used in both the cases?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to search Physical Stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor based on Storage Bin?
entry.content:
Hi SAP legends!

I'm trying to find a way to set Storage Bin value on Physical stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor. Any idea?

Any help is much appreciated. Thank you in advance!

Best,
Alexandros

entry.title: Cancelpick EWM error message code is /SCDL/ICC001
entry.content: I'm trying cancelpick in EWM and i get error message code is /SCDL/ICC001. Does anyone have any idea?

entry.title: WPT issue for Single Warehouse is assigned with a plant having multiple Sloc
entry.content:
Hi Team,


As per business requirement we have maintained one warehouse with a plant having multiple storage location. So while fetching the WPT -Warehouse process type, will be challenging for same products will be going to "Multiple Sloc for the same Plant". Please help us with this scenario.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Why WOCR is not getting selected in WO instead only DEF is getting selected
entry.content:
WOCR was configured as below

Search of WOCR duly assigned to respective Activity Area

But while creating Ware house task it is selecting DEF

 

But while assigning WOCR in Ware House process type it gets selected duly

entry.title: automatic replenishment task exceeding maximum qty of bin
entry.content:
Hello SAP World,

we are replenishing at bin level using automatic replenishment. We have activated replenishment for storage type. we have maintained fixed bin assignment with min and max qty at bin level.

Testing: once pick task is created and confirmed. if stock level is less than min qty,  replenishment task is getting created automatically.  But the task is getting created for full max qty. it is not calculating qty to meet the max qty.

Eg: min qty:5 pc , max qty:10 pc

stock available:2 pc

replenishment task created: 10 pc.

But it should have been created for 8 pc.

Please recommend solution.

entry.title: Implementing Tablets that Run SAP EWM.
entry.content:
Hello
I want to implement tablets for my Inventory management team. We used to work with RF but it does not show as many information as we would like, so we have to carry laptops to almost every place we plan to do inventory and analysis. Can we use SAP EWM on a tablet that runs WINDOWS 10-11? We use decentralized ERP-EWM, but we only need EWM in order to visualize more information. 
Thanks.

entry.title: How to change source HU during picking by using exception code
entry.content: I want to change source HU during picking process, how can I do that, by using exception codes? CHHU does not work, it changes only the destination HU.

entry.title: Assign Activities to Text Identifier visible in RF
entry.content:
Hello,

Under the standard config of, 'Assign Activities to Text Identifiers' it says we can activate text to be visible within RF. I have assigned TX17 to activity, Pick.  

There doesn't seem to be anyway to view the text passed from the sales order into RF.

 

Our business scenario: On certain deliveries to specific customers, we must pack in a very unique way. We will be creating HUs on RF as we pick for the outbound delivery. At the time of picking, our picker needs to know if this is the unique scenario for packing.

entry.title: \/SCWM/IM_PC transaction code, all line items are visible, including those that have not been staged
entry.content:
We have created a process order after which we perform partial staging using transaction COR2. However, I've noticed that in the /SCWM/IM_PC transaction code, all line items are visible, including those that have not been staged.

 

Ideally, we should only see the line item that has been staged. Because of this behavior every delivery document contains all the components which are already staged or needs to be staged. We get quantity as zero for the components which are not staged, however by this behavior our users get confused as all the materials show up every time and it is inconvenient as a human to check all the materials to find which has quantity more than zero.

 

Kindly help us on this process as we wish to only see the components which are staged while the delivery is created, this would help the users to efficiently bring in the required quantity for dispensing.

entry.title: Issue with SAP Yard Logistics: Visual Business Screen Not Displayed
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm experiencing an issue in SAP Yard Logistics when attempting to open the Yard Cockpit or Yard Layout Editor. The Visual Business screen doesn't display correctly

I'm using the UI5 variant, and I can't seem to find any relevant errors in the backend. However, the Chrome console is showing the following errors:

GET https://hostname/sap/bc/webdynpro/SAPYL/null 500 (Internal Server Error)

Error: resource sap/ui/vbm/i18n/manifest.json could not be loaded from /sap/public/bc/ui5_ui5/resources/sap/ui/vbm/i18n/manifest.json

The system is loading the Visual Business navigation elements, but none of the Yard Logistics-specific elements like bins are displayed. Interestingly, I can load a different background map via the API and move it, so some parts of the Visual Business seem functional.

I have already verified that all installation prerequisites have been met, so I don't believe that's the root cause.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or know of a possible solution? Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: I have a issues reagrding the VAS KIT to stock in EWM- ERROR WHILE GENERATING OR UPDATING DELIVERY
entry.content:
Hello Guru, 

I am currently facing issue with regarding with VAS KIT to stock, as per the below screenshot- Document not created and error while creating or updating the delivery. 

I have configured WPT for KTSI and I have assinged the document type to WPT, 

I have created the VAS Bin and assinged the bin to VAS work center

2 packspec created one with KITS pack grp and the other one with my Packspec 

also updated VAS relevance for KITS. 

Could you please help what I may be missing still?

entry.title: I am facing an error in retrieving IBD in EWM, error message number - SR053 - An exception has occur
entry.content:
After creating the Delivery in S4 , I get the message Delivery has been distributed however when I go to EWM it does not bring the IBD. After checking  in the Queue SMQ1 it says "an exception has occurred that was not caught" Error message number  SR053 

Has anyone experienced this, I am using S4 system 2023 FSP 1

Thanks,

Faraz
